set security policies from-zone untrust to-zone dmz policy deny-web-inbound match source-address any
set security policies from-zone untrust to-zone dmz policy deny-web-inbound match destination-address web-servers
set security policies from-zone untrust to-zone dmz policy deny-web-inbound match application web-services
set security policies from-zone untrust to-zone dmz policy deny-web-inbound then deny
